The '''Bothan High Command''' was a military command of [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] commanding officers based on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
[[File:Bothan_Spy_BFII.png|thumb|right|120px|A Bothan Spy of the Bothan High Command.]]
Due to the immense assistance of Bothan [[Spy/Legends|spies]] to the Rebellion effort, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] appointed three Bothan leaders to high officer status, stationing them on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] to overlook the secondary rebel posts on the planet, aside from the primary [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Temple]] Base. After the major Rebel victory at [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Bothan High Command's forces on Yavin IV were at last free to relax, and so were not prepared for the [[Strike on Yavin 4|sudden retaliatory attack]] of survivors of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] at their hangar-base. The base was successfully raided, and although the Bothan High Command were able to clothe themselves in [[Stealth field generator/Legends|stealth field generators]], the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], nevertheless, overwhelmed and exterminated all three of them as quickly as possible.<ref name="Battlefront II" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' {{1st}}
